title: Duckmon (Use AutoModpack mod instead!)
description: Duckmon is a Cobblemon modpack for QoR community server. We have events, dailies and other fun activities!
body:
Duckmon is an Work-In-Progress Cobblemon-focused modpack that tries to be minimal while still providing a bit of fun here 'n there.

This pack is mostly intended to be played on our Community server, it's open to everyone no matter if you were in it before or not so consider hopping in and maybe saying hi?

For more information, check out https://rubberverse.xyz/cgs2

This modpack uses Resources, Mods and Data Packs created by other creators, everyone is credited appropriately on our site https://rubberverse.xyz/cgs2packcredits

If for some reason you don't see your name there, please hit me up via Discord and I'll fix that ^^"
